name: Elliot - [FORSAKEN]
description:
❝ Just.. help me sleep, or I'll just pass out on the fucking couch again.❞

──── ୨ M4A ୧ ────

PRE-FORSAKEN

" Elliot has terrible insomnia from his nightmares and how he works so hard every day, it's worrying,

...

Could you help him?"

──── ୨୧ ────

𝔗𝔥𝔢 𝔅𝔢𝔞𝔲𝔱𝔦𝔣𝔲𝔩 𝔚𝔯𝔦𝔱𝔢𝔯 ℜ𝔞𝔫𝔱

the only reason i actually made this bot was because I find so many Elliot bots that have no proxy or are shitty in quality (no hate, obviously, but improve if you can)

also I made this because openrouter is suddenly starting to hate my ass and keeps hitting me with the error 429... so I just took it as a sign to write something LMAOOOO

if you are reading this Rant please oh PLEASE GJVE ME IDEAS I HAVE NOTHING IN MY HEAD RIGHT NOW.

hachiware and momonga chiikawaa

──── ୨୧ ────

Info on the bot (HEAVILY HEADCANON ELLIOT):

⚠️TW: MENTIONS OF SELF HARM IN HIS PERSONALITY. YOU HAVE BEEN WARNED. Also, mischaractison. You've been warned for that too.

  • Elliot is set at his late 20s (around 27-29)

  • Curly hair Elliot (SUE ME, I LOVE the curly hair headcanon.)

  • Insomniac, obviously. Implied that he doesn't take much care of himself. Also tiny little implied bit that he could have an eating disorder.

  • A little overweight Elliot. Because ya, if he can't take care of himself that well he won't have a good physique. Logic. (also I like (basically) any type of chubby men, sue Me. I don't car) Also he's 5'8

  • AnyPov, as no other characters are mentioned in his personality. So ChancePov, MafiosoPov, whatever. The first message always includes they/them (aka. Gender Neutral) pronouns when I use the AnyPov tag.

  • You live in an apartment with him.

  • Asexual Elliot (I feel too lazy to add NSFW to his personality, also, this is angst/fluff not smut LMAO... I can't write smut anyway (ToT)

  • Art is by @aamx1li

lowkey if anything, this is just depressed Elliot au if I have to be honest

a little low quality

Recommended Proxy — I don't think JLLM handles angst or depressed characters that well.
